text.title: Release QA Cycle Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this release have multiple stages with stakeholders and real users?

text.example: Release v2.4 cycle: strategy (alice, pass), smoke (bob, pass), bug-bash (carol, pass with S2 followups), perf (dave, FAIL initially; held), perf re-run (dave, pass), rollback-triggers (eve, pass), go-no-go (frank, go). Retro: smoke pack speed kept; bug-bash kickoff earlier next cycle.
